prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约27736→28908→36406→39109→38685，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约9800名；2025年基准约38685名，较2024年略有回升约4 24名；2021–2025年本省物理类计划分别为113→111→104→100→95人，逐年小幅缩减；2026年计划117人，较2025年扩招约23.2%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有 一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第88→2022年第89→2023年第88→2024年第92→2025年第84→2026年第89，排名稳定在80 –90区间，属中上游211；2026年声誉评价未见长安大学相关负面舆情；抖音热度排名第83位，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量中等，无明显热度波动；近年无投档 断档记录，报考心理平稳；交通运输工程为A-学科（第五轮），是该校王牌，对应道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通工程、交通运输等核心招生专业，对相关方向考生 有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热或偏热；土木建筑类明显劝退；本省2026年高考总报名约52.1 万人，较2025年约35.8万大幅增长约45%，其中物理类估算约37.9万人，竞争基数显著扩大；省控线物理类本科批2024年462分、2025年463分，基本稳定；长安 大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校；该校在江苏招生占比约2–3%（2025年江苏招生约101人，占全国约2.8%），属跨省招生常规比例，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招23.2%与江苏省考生总数大幅增长约45%的双向对冲，扩招缓解了部分竞争压力但考生基数扩大更为显著；结合学校层次稳定、声誉平 稳、王牌学科交通运输工程A-的持续吸引力，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准38685名基础上进一步后移，预测最低位次约44011名，区间43511–44511名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（华为班/未来交通/计算机长安学堂计划等）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机类/计算机科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类/电子信息类
- 车辆工程/机械类
- 数学类/应用物理学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 土木类/建筑类
- 材料类/地质学类/环境科学与工程类
- 工商管理类/经济学类/公共管理类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约44011名，区间43511–44511名。建议位次在区间下限（43511名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（工科试验班、电气、计算机）；位次在区间中段的考生以二档 专业为主（自动化、车辆、数学类）；位次接近区间上限（44511名）或略后的考生以三档专业保底（土木、材料、工商管理），注意土木建筑类社会热度偏低，报考时需结合个 人兴趣。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 27736 → 28908 → 36406 → 39109 → 38685, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9800 positions in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 38685, slightly up by about 424 positions compared to 2024; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 113 → 111 → 104 → 100 → 95 respectively, decreasing slightly year by year; the 2026 plan is 117 students, an increase of about 23.2% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026 was 88 → 89 → 88 → 92 → 84 → 89, stable in the 80–90 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities; in 2026, no negative public opinion related to Chang'an University was found; its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no significant popularity fluctuations; there have been no recent records of application gaps, indicating stable application psychology; its Transportation Engineering discipline is rated A- (fifth round), the university's flagship, corresponding to core enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, and Transportation, which strongly attract candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly or relatively hot in society; Civil Engineering and Architecture are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in this province is approximately 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% compared to about 358,000 in 2025, with an estimated 379,000 in the Physics Category, greatly expanding the competition base; the provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch was 462 in 2024 and 463 in 2025, basically stable; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 2–3% (about 101 students in Jiangsu in 2025, accounting for about 2.8% of the national total), a normal cross-provincial enrollment ratio, with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 23.2% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the substantial 45% increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province, the expansion alleviates some competitive pressure, but the increase in the candidate base is more significant; combined with the stable university level, stable reputation, and the sustained appeal of the flagship A- discipline Transportation Engineering, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will further shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 38685, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 44011, in the range of 43511–44511.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Huawei Class/Future Transportation/Computer Chang'an Academy Plan, etc.)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Class/Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation Class/Electronic Information Class
- Vehicle Engineering/Mechanical Class
- Mathematics Class/Applied Physics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering Class/Architecture Class
- Materials Class/Geology Class/Environmental Science and Engineering Class
- Business Administration Class/Economics Class/Public Administration Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 44011, range 43511–44511. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (43511) are advised to focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Engineering Pilot Class, Electrical, Computer); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Automation, Vehicle, Mathematics); candidates with rankings near or slightly below the upper limit of the range (44511) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Civil Engineering, Materials, Business Administration), noting that Civil Engineering and Architecture have lower social popularity, so candidates should consider personal interests when applying.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次约5464→6073→6628→7092→8106，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约2642名；2025年基准约8106名，较2024年后移约1014名，后移幅度扩 大；2021–2025年本省历史类计划分别为7→7→6→5→12人，2025年曾扩至12人；2026年计划9人，较2025年缩招25%，计划缩减明显。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安 大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名稳定在80–90区间，属中上游211，对文科考生仍具一定吸引力；2026年声誉评价未见长安大学相关负面舆情；抖音热度排名第83位，评价为“一般”；近年无投档断档记录，报考心理平稳；交通运输工程A-为该校王牌，但历史类招生专业（法学、英语、新闻传播学类、工 商管理类、行政管理等）与该学科关联度较低；学科评估方面，法学、工商管理、新闻传播学等专业无A类评级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热但分化明显，新闻传 播学类明显劝退，工商管理类分化观望；本省2026年高考总报名约52.1万人，历史类估算约14.2万人，较2025年9.7万人大幅增长约46%，竞争基数显著扩大；省控线历史类本科批 2024年478分、2025年482分，略有上升；长安大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校；该校在江苏历史类招生人数较少（2025年12人，2026年9人），属跨省招生常规 比例，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划缩招25%与江苏省历史类考生总数大幅增长约46%的双重压力，竞争加剧明显；学校层次稳 定但优势学科与文科专业关联度低，法学、新闻传播等专业社会热度分化或偏低。预计2026年历史类最低位次在2025年基准8106名基础上进一步前移（更难进），预测最低位次约 6860名，区间6360–7360名。

一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

- 英语。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category has shifted from approximately 5464 → 6073 → 6628 → 7092 → 8106, moving backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 2642 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 8106, shifting backward by about 1014 places compared to 2024, with an expanded shift magnitude; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for History Category were 7 → 7 → 6 → 5 → 12 students, with an expansion to 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 9 students, a 25% reduction compared to 2025, indicating a significant contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking is stable in the 80–90 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities, still attractive to liberal arts candidates; in 2026, there is no negative public opinion related to Chang'an University; its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average'; there have been no recent records of enrollment gaps, indicating stable application psychology; its top discipline, Transportation Engineering (A-), is a flagship, but the majors offered in History Category (Law, English, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, Administrative Management, etc.) have low correlation with this discipline; in terms of discipline evaluation, Law, Business Administration, and Journalism and Communication have no A-level ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity but with clear divergence; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; Business Administration shows divergence and wait-and-see attitude; the total number of Gaokao registrations in the province for 2026 is approximately 521,000, with an estimated 142,000 in History Category, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 97,000 in 2025, leading to a substantially expanded competition base; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch was 478 in 2024 and 482 in 2025, showing a slight increase; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a provincial university; its enrollment in History Category in Jiangsu is small (12 in 2025, 9 in 2026), which is a normal proportion for cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the 25% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the significant increase of about 46% in the total number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province, competition is intensifying; the university level is stable, but its advantageous disciplines have low correlation with liberal arts majors, and the social popularity of majors like Law and Journalism and Communication is either divergent or low. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will further move forward (harder to enter) from the 2025 baseline of 8106, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 6860, and a range of 6360–7360.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Chinese Language and Literature)
- English.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Administrative Management (including Emergency Management direction)
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 6860, range 6360–7360. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (6360) can aim for Tier 1 majors (Law, Business Administration); those in the middle of the range should focus on Tier 2 majors (Journalism and Communication, English), noting that Journalism and Communication has clearly discouraged social popularity, requiring personal interest consideration; candidates near the upper limit of the range (7360) or slightly behind should use Tier 3 majors (Administrative Management, Architecture) as safety options.
